_comment: Fertilizer catalogue for the Shop page. Add/edit products here — the page rebuilds itself. PRICE: leave as null to show 'Pricing on request' (nothing false ships); set a number (e.g. 24) once Matt confirms the retail price. CHECKOUT: while 'checkout_live' is false, the order button emails an order request; when a real checkout exists, set a product's 'buy_url' to its payment link and flip 'checkout_live' to true — see CLAUDE.md.

products.name: FPJ fertilizer
products.summary: Organic fermented plant juice — pet- and child-safe. It feeds the plant and inoculates the soil food web at the same time. Use 15 ml per litre on any plant, at any stage.
features: Every ingredient named on the label
products.image_alt: An amber glass jug of FPJ fertilizer on a greenhouse potting bench surrounded by seedlings.
